channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti, 5th July
item.description:

item.title: Street light hanging off pole, 5th July
item.description:
Street light hanging off pole. Pole 005. Not sure how long but hanging by cord, moves in the wind.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Balder Rise, Chinbrook, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The pavement on the corner of Plasitow Lane and Willoughby lane needs cleaning up and the trees and bushes need trimming., 5th July
item.description:
The pavement on the corner of Plaistow Lane and Willoughby lane needs cleaning up and the trees and bushes need trimming, bushes overgrown and gutters full of leaves and rubbish.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Plaistow Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter in Tile Kiln Lane, 5th July
item.description:
Litter strewn all along Tile Kiln Lane
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tile Kiln Lane, Southgate

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 91, Herne Hill, Dulwich Village, Greater London

item.title: Public bin needs emptying - it is overflowing with dog poo unhygienic and unsafe, 5th July
item.description:
The bin is overflowing with dog poo bags it needs emptying urgently. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aldersmead Road, New Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti on noticeboard, 5th July
item.description:

item.title: Filthy and risky for children, 5th July
item.description:
Children and elderly have to walk on the road to get by, as Thames Water are repairing Westernham Avenue, speeding car go on to Bromley Road, and this is dangerous situation for children and elderly

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westerham Avenue, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Malvern road, 5th July
item.description:
The street is a mess - litter and rubbish everywhere that needs a proper clean

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Malvern Road, London
